---
applyTo: "src/styles.css,src/components/**"
description: Mizizi design system and component patterns
---

# Design system

- Tokens in `src/styles.css` — forest/moss palette, risk semantic colors, `font-display`, `font-mono-data`.
- shadcn primitives in `src/components/ui/` — customize via CSS variables.
- Landing: `src/components/landing/`. App features: `src/components/app/`.
- Restrained motion. Use `PlaceholderPanel` for in-progress app surfaces.
